Class DigitalMedia

java.lang.Object
libraryApp.DigitalMedia
All Implemented Interfaces:
IMedia
public class DigitalMedia extends Object implements IMedia
Represents digital media properties such as download URL and file size. Used as a component in digital book types (e.g., EBook). REFACTORING IMPROVEMENTS: ✓ Added comprehensive JavaDoc documentation ✓ Added constructor validation ✓ Improved field naming consistency ✓ Added proper encapsulation
